ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING WITH DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE. [PER APPEAL COURT ORDER] HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE
ORDER - CHALLENGE OF VENUE GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY REFILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARIFFE, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACY, SARAH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2024 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED FOR THE COURT TO ADDRESS THE VENUE CHALLENGE WHICH WAS FILED PRIOR TO THE INITIAL HEARING. SARAH LACY DOES NOT OWE KATHLEEN CARIFFE ANY MONEY AT THIS TIME (SEE SCANNED STATEMENT OF REASONS). THIS ORDER ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF FEB-16-2024. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CARIFFE, KATHLEEN TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT LACY, SARAH SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF REASONS. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
